category_sources: source_facts.description says Solr is an enterprise search platform; official Solr Reference Guide calls Solr an open source search and analytics platform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is solr.apache.org; official site and GitHub README use Apache Solr.
docs_sources: Official Solr Reference Guide states it is the official Solr documentation; Solr resources page links documentation and Javadocs.
repo_sources: Official Apache Solr GitHub repository describes itself as Apache Solr source and points to solr.apache.org for project details.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Solr docs describe search, analytics, indexing, and the solr command.
